entry.title: IDC GS00Q17NSD3009 (P00391) awarded to VERIZON BUSINESS NETWORK SERVICES LLC, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITC OFFICE OF ACQUISITION OPERATIONS, INTERAGENCY CONTRACTS

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Per Section G of the contract and FAR Subpart 16.505

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: TO ADD TWENTY FOUR VARIOUS SERVICE-RELATED EQUIPMENT (SRE) DEVICE CLASS IDS AND DISCOUNT CLASSES TO THE ENTERPRISE INFRASTRUCTURE SOLUTIONS (EIS) CONTRACT GS00Q17NSD3009 AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL VZ00775.03A.

ns1:legislativeMandates.ns1:otherStatutoryAuthority: 40 U.S.C 11314 - AUTHORITY TO ACQUIRE AND MANAGE INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:contractMarketingData.ns1:orderingProcedure: Per Section G of the contract and FAR Subpart 16.505

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: IN THE VZ00833.02A SUBMISSION, VERIZON IS PROPOSING ADMINISTRATIVE CHANGES TO THE COVER PAGES OF THE EIS CONTRACT GS00Q17NSD3009. ALL VOLUME FILES HAVE BEEN UPDATED TO INCLUDE THE LLC COMPANY NAME CHANGE AND TO REPLACE KEVIN ANDERSONS NAME AND CONTACT INFORMATION WITH SHERELLE WATKINS.
